things.name: Teotihuacan Pyramids
things.description: Ancient Mesoamerican city with the colossal Pyramid of the Sun and Pyramid of the Moon

things.name: National Museum of Anthropology
things.description: World-class museum with the Aztec Sun Stone and greatest collection of Mesoamerican artefacts

things.name: Historic Centre & Zocalo
things.description: Vast main square flanked by the Metropolitan Cathedral and National Palace murals by Diego Rivera

things.name: Frida Kahlo Museum (Casa Azul)
things.description: The iconic Blue House in Coyoacan where Frida Kahlo was born, lived and died

things.name: Chapultepec Castle & Park
things.description: Former imperial palace atop a hill in the world's largest urban park, with sweeping city views

things.name: Xochimilco Floating Gardens
things.description: UNESCO-listed network of canals with colourful trajinera boats, mariachi and local food

things.name: Palacio de Bellas Artes
things.description: Magnificent Art Nouveau and Art Deco palace housing murals by Rivera, Orozco and Siqueiros

things.name: UNAM Campus & Museo Universitario Arte Contemporaneo
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage campus with volcanic stone architecture and Diego Rivera's stadium mosaic

things.name: Templo Mayor
things.description: Excavated Aztec twin temple in the heart of the historic centre with an excellent on-site museum

things.name: Mercado de La Merced
things.description: One of the largest and most vibrant traditional markets in the Americas with thousands of stalls
